title: Finite Group Action Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite group-action bad identity QF_UF/Alethe regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: The identity element of a fixed finite group action must fix every point; the EUF row refutes a malformed action table that maps a point to a distinct image under the identity.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional group-action rows only when they add distinct congruence pressure; keep orbit-stabilizer, Burnside/Cauchy-Frobenius, quotient actions, and representation theory in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed finite group actions as deterministic table obligations.
Replay action-law, orbit, stabilizer, orbit-stabilizer, and Burnside rows through Axeyum model evaluation over finite tables.
Route malformed finite identity-action rows through checked QF_UF/Alethe evidence once exact table replay identifies the failing point.

Keep arbitrary group-action theorems, Burnside/Cauchy-Frobenius in full generality, group actions on algebraic/topological structures, and representation theory under Lean horizon until formal routes exist.
